mapper.select:
SELECT type, id, name, area, projectName, description FROM ( SELECT 'project' AS type, p.project_id AS id, p.project_name AS name, p.area AS area, NULL AS projectName, LEFT(p.project_intro, 80) AS description, COALESCE(p.update_time, p.create_time) AS sortTime FROM heritage_project p WHERE p.status = 1 AND ( p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.project_intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
UNION ALL
SELECT 'inheritor' AS type, i.inheritor_id AS id, i.name AS name, NULL AS area, p.project_name AS projectName, LEFT(i.intro, 80) AS description, COALESCE(i.update_time, i.create_time) AS sortTime FROM heritage_inheritor i INNER JOIN heritage_project p ON i.project_id = p.project_id WHERE i.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'news' AS type, n.news_id AS id, n.title AS name, NULL AS area, NULL AS projectName, LEFT(n.summary, 80) AS description, COALESCE(n.update_time, n.publish_time, n.create_time) AS sortTime FROM heritage_news n WHERE n.status = 'published' AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) t ORDER BY t.sortTime DESC, t.id DESC
